roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: CREDIT CALCULATIONS/DEF:APPEARING VIA ZOOM/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST ENTER AND COMPLETE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT FATHER ALFRED'S/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST REPORT TO PTD 5X A WEEK FOR SUPERVISION/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOPU: DEFENDANTIN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/
